docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOSA, LORENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, RAFAEL
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED AS TO ALFREDO SANTOS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOSA, LORENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUARTE, RAFAEL THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2010 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SOSA, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
